recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: 4L
recommendations.overview: To find Joseba, a dying friend, and see him reunite with his daughter Ely, two old friends, Jean Pierre and Tocho, embark with her on a road trip through the Sahara desert, from Spain to Mali.

recommendations.title: Drawing Closer
recommendations.overview: With only a year left to live, 17-year-old Akito finds new meaning in life by bringing joy to a terminally ill girl who has just six months remaining.

recommendations.title: Babyteeth
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill teen upsets her parents when she falls in love with a small-time drug dealer.

recommendations.title: It's Only the End of the World
recommendations.overview: Louis, a terminally ill writer, returns home after a long absence to tell his family that he is dying.

recommendations.title: A Love Song for Bobby Long
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young woman returns to New Orleans after the death of her estranged mother.

recommendations.title: How to Make Millions Before Grandma Dies
recommendations.overview: M, a university dropout low on money and luck, volunteers to take care of his terminally ill grandmother, in the hope of pocketing an inheritance.

recommendations.title: Y Tu Mamá También
recommendations.overview: In Mexico, two teenage boys and an attractive older woman embark on a road trip and learn a thing or two about life, friendship, sex, and each other.

recommendations.title: The Estate
recommendations.overview: Down-on-her-luck divorcee Macey and her fickle sister Savanna attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please Aunt Hilda in hopes of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members

recommendations.title: Meet the Leroys
recommendations.overview: A man takes his wife and their teenage children on a road trip down memory lane while facing divorce.
